title: Job Openings at Club Xcyte Lagos
content:
Club Xcyte Lagos is where Lagos nightlife reaches new heights—literally. Perched above the city, this upscale night club blends luxury, style, and high-energy entertainment. Enjoy premium drinks, exceptional service, and a vibrant mix of music curated by top DJs, all set against panoramic city views. Whether you’re celebrating, unwinding, or looking to experience Lagos from a new perspective,Club Xcyte Lagos offers an unforgettable night of excitement.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) AI Specialist

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We’re building a team that understands nightlife, creativity and luxury.
	We’re looking for energetic, creative and hardworking individuals ready to work and grow with Club Xcyte.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: For more enquiries; visit their location at 3, Piccadilly Way, Igbo Efon Bus Stop, Lagos or WhatsApp: 09135865228.

 

 

2.) Promoter

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We’re building a team that understands nightlife, creativity and luxury.
	We’re looking for energetic, creative and hardworking individuals ready to work and grow with Club Xcyte.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: For more enquiries; Visit their location at 3, Piccadilly Way, Igbo Efon Busstop, Lagos or WhatsApp: 09135865228.

 

 

3.) Content Creator

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We’re building a team that understands nightlife, creativity and luxury.
	We’re looking for energetic, creative and hardworking individuals ready to work and grow with Club Xcyte.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications.


Method of Application 

Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

For more enquiries: Visit their location at 3, Piccadilly Way, Igbo Efon Busstop, Lagos or WhatsApp: 09135865228.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Field Sales Officer",
  "description": "Winock Group drives impactful solutions across Lending, Solar, and Agriculture sectors in Africa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Field Sales Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are interested in hiring a Solar Sales Officer who will support the Sales Manager and Sales Department to achieve sales targets, generate and convert leads, increase revenue, recruit and retain agents and decrease agents churn rates.
	The ideal candidate will provide the marketing information that will translate to building key customer relationships, identifying business opportunities, negotiating, and closing business deals.
	You will also maintain extensive knowledge of current market conditions and help achieve expected sales targets. If you are passionate about Sales and are highly efficient, we would like to meet you.


Responsibilities
Sales / Marketing:


	Present, promote and sell Winock solar offerings using persuasive communication to existing and prospective customers.
	Ensure the growth of the company&rsquo;s business through aggressive sales and techniques.
	Maintain relationships with clients by providing support, information, and guidance.Generating Leads, Meeting and/or exceeding sales targets.
	Create, plan and schedule presentations of company products to existing and potential customers.
	Ensure customer retention.


Record Keeping:


	Keep a record of customers visited or sold to and update it regularly.
	Preparing weekly and monthly sales reports.


Market / Product Research:


	Perform cost-benefit, marketing intelligence and competitive and needs analysis of existing and potential customers to meet their needs.
	Recommend new opportunities and service improvements.
	Visiting customers and potential customers to evaluate needs and/or promote new Winock solar products.
	Liaise with the finance department to reconcile stock and products supplied.
	Present market updates based on existing and potential customers&rsquo; needs and research scale done.


Customer Service / Relations:


	Establish, develop, and maintain positive business and customer relationships.
	Ensure smooth delivery of products to customers within your area of operation and across Nigeria where necessary.
	Expedite the resolution of customer problems and complaints to maximize satisfaction.
	Perform any other duties that may be assigned.


Requirements / Skills


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree / Higher National Diploma in Marketing, Economics, Business Administration or any Social Sciences related fields.
	2 years of experience in sales and Business Development especially in the Solar/Renewables.
	Excellent communication skills with the ability to close sales.
	Good computer knowledge especially Microsoft Word, Excel, and PowerPoint.
	Ability to work with little or no supervision.
	Good knowledge of sales techniques.
	Good knowledge of the job location and its environs as well as its business potential.
	Excellent knowledge of B2B and B2C business models.


Salary
N150,000 / Month plus Commission on Sales.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.",

Field Sales Officer Job at Winock Limited




        
    

        
        Winock Group drives impactful solutions across Lending, Solar, and Agriculture sectors in Africa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Field Sales Officer

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are interested in hiring a Solar Sales Officer who will support the Sales Manager and Sales Department to achieve sales targets, generate and convert leads, increase revenue, recruit and retain agents and decrease agents churn rates.
	The ideal candidate will provide the marketing information that will translate to building key customer relationships, identifying business opportunities, negotiating, and closing business deals.
	You will also maintain extensive knowledge of current market conditions and help achieve expected sales targets. If you are passionate about Sales and are highly efficient, we would like to meet you.


Responsibilities
Sales / Marketing:


	Present, promote and sell Winock solar offerings using persuasive communication to existing and prospective customers.
	Ensure the growth of the company’s business through aggressive sales and techniques.
	Maintain relationships with clients by providing support, information, and guidance.Generating Leads, Meeting and/or exceeding sales targets.
	Create, plan and schedule presentations of company products to existing and potential customers.
	Ensure customer retention.


Record Keeping:


	Keep a record of customers visited or sold to and update it regularly.
	Preparing weekly and monthly sales reports.


Market / Product Research:


	Perform cost-benefit, marketing intelligence and competitive and needs analysis of existing and potential customers to meet their needs.
	Recommend new opportunities and service improvements.
	Visiting customers and potential customers to evaluate needs and/or promote new Winock solar products.
	Liaise with the finance department to reconcile stock and products supplied.
	Present market updates based on existing and potential customers’ needs and research scale done.


Customer Service / Relations:


	Establish, develop, and maintain positive business and customer relationships.
	Ensure smooth delivery of products to customers within your area of operation and across Nigeria where necessary.
	Expedite the resolution of customer problems and complaints to maximize satisfaction.
	Perform any other duties that may be assigned.


Requirements / Skills


	Bachelor’s Degree / Higher National Diploma in Marketing, Economics, Business Administration or any Social Sciences related fields.
	2 years of experience in sales and Business Development especially in the Solar/Renewables.
	Excellent communication skills with the ability to close sales.
	Good computer knowledge especially Microsoft Word, Excel, and PowerPoint.
	Ability to work with little or no supervision.
	Good knowledge of sales techniques.
	Good knowledge of the job location and its environs as well as its business potential.
	Excellent knowledge of B2B and B2C business models.


Salary
N150,000 / Month plus Commission on Sales.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Utiva Nigeria -&nbsp;&nbsp;We are a technology education and talent accelerator platform helping African tech talent gain in-demand skills and connect with global opportunities.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Growth Manager, Enterprise (B2B)

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type:&nbsp;Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role


	We are looking for a Growth Manager (B2B) to drive enterprise revenue by acquiring and managing corporate clients.
	You will engage HR leaders, L&amp;D teams, and business executives to position our learning solutions for workforce development and talent upskilling.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify, prospect, and close B2B clients (SMEs, corporates, institutions).
	Manage the full sales cycle from lead generation to deal closure.
	Build and maintain relationships with key decision-makers.
	Develop tailored proposals based on client needs.
	Meet and exceed revenue and pipeline targets.
	Track activities and pipeline using CRM tools.


Requirements


	B.Sc / HND in Business Administration, Marketing or other related course.
	3&ndash;4 years of experience in B2B sales or business development.
	Proven track record of closing corporate deals.
	Strong communication and negotiation skills.
	Experience engaging senior stakeholders.
	Target-driven and self-motivated.
	Background in EdTech, HR Tech, or SaaS is a plus.


Method of Application&nbsp;

Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;wuraola@utiva.co&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Growth Manager, Enterprise (B2B) Job at Utiva Nigeria




        
    

        
        Utiva Nigeria -  We are a technology education and talent accelerator platform helping African tech talent gain in-demand skills and connect with global opportunities.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Growth Manager, Enterprise (B2B)

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a Growth Manager (B2B) to drive enterprise revenue by acquiring and managing corporate clients.
	You will engage HR leaders, L&D teams, and business executives to position our learning solutions for workforce development and talent upskilling.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify, prospect, and close B2B clients (SMEs, corporates, institutions).
	Manage the full sales cycle from lead generation to deal closure.
	Build and maintain relationships with key decision-makers.
	Develop tailored proposals based on client needs.
	Meet and exceed revenue and pipeline targets.
	Track activities and pipeline using CRM tools.


Requirements


	B.Sc / HND in Business Administration, Marketing or other related course.
	3–4 years of experience in B2B sales or business development.
	Proven track record of closing corporate deals.
	Strong communication and negotiation skills.
	Experience engaging senior stakeholders.
	Target-driven and self-motivated.
	Background in EdTech, HR Tech, or SaaS is a plus.


Method of Application 

Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Accountant Job at Compovine Technologies Limited

Accountant Job at Compovine Technologies Limited




        
    

        
        Compovine Technologies Limited is an indigenous company with the main aim of offering Information Technology, Sales and Services to individuals and corporate organizations. Compovine Technology Limited currently has branches in Ibadan, Abuja, Lagos, Lokoja, Kano, Kaduna, Jos, Minna, Port Harcourt and Enugu, and we are still expanding.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirement
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Candidates should possess a relevant qualification.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Experienced Restaurant (QSR) Manager",
  "description": "Food Concepts commenced operations in 2001. From inception, our aim has been clear-cut and focused: to revolutionize the food sector in West Africa and to deliver extraordinary satisfaction to our stakeholders.

Since launching in 2004, Chicken Republic (Subsidiary of Food concepts) has already opened 55 stores in Nigeria and Ghana. On this basis, we are proud of the brand&rsquo;s hard-earned reputation as the fastest growing chicken QSR in West Africa and the number 1 chicken QSR in Nigeria (both in revenues and number of outlets). In addition, Chicken Republic was ranked as one of Nigeria&rsquo;s top 20 brands across all categories (Financial Standards Awards 2009).

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Experienced Restaurant (QSR) Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Agidingbi, Lagos

Qualifications


	First Degree or HND, OND with at-least Second-Class Lower Division/Lower Credit or equivalent experience;
	Minimum of two(2) years of hands-on managerial experience in a topnotch Quick Service Restaurant (QSR); and
	Trackable achievement in Operations, Financial Planning and Control, Customer Service, People Development, Profit and Loss and Sales Building.
	Interested applicants must be resident in ikeja, ogba and oshodi to be qualified for the Job role.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;careers@foodconceptsplc.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note:&nbsp;Food Concepts PLC will not be liable for relocation or accommodation expenses for successful candidates; as such, only candidates who can conveniently live and work in the stated location will be considered.",

  "validThrough": "2026-06-07",

Experienced Restaurant (QSR) Manager Job at Food Concepts Plc




        
    

        
        Food Concepts commenced operations in 2001. From inception, our aim has been clear-cut and focused: to revolutionize the food sector in West Africa and to deliver extraordinary satisfaction to our stakeholders.

Since launching in 2004, Chicken Republic (Subsidiary of Food concepts) has already opened 55 stores in Nigeria and Ghana. On this basis, we are proud of the brand’s hard-earned reputation as the fastest growing chicken QSR in West Africa and the number 1 chicken QSR in Nigeria (both in revenues and number of outlets). In addition, Chicken Republic was ranked as one of Nigeria’s top 20 brands across all categories (Financial Standards Awards 2009).

We are recruiting to fill the position below:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Position: Experienced Restaurant (QSR) Manager

Job Location: Agidingbi, Lagos

Qualifications


	First Degree or HND, OND with at-least Second-Class Lower Division/Lower Credit or equivalent experience;
	Minimum of two(2) years of hands-on managerial experience in a topnotch Quick Service Restaurant (QSR); and
	Trackable achievement in Operations, Financial Planning and Control, Customer Service, People Development, Profit and Loss and Sales Building.
	Interested applicants must be resident in ikeja, ogba and oshodi to be qualified for the Job role.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: Food Concepts PLC will not be liable for relocation or accommodation expenses for successful candidates; as such, only candidates who can conveniently live and work in the stated location will be considered.    

    

        Click here to Apply
